span.p:
from T25 PoC plan (parallel tracks)
and T27 PoC Go/No-Go (main)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T28 Finalise vendor agreement (7d)
PARALLEL - Commercial
A: Procurement (R/A)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T30 Manufacturing + logistics readiness (10d)
PARALLEL - Supply
A: IoT Engineer

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T38 Pre-order initial stock (3d)
LAUNCH MILESTONE
A: Finance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T29 Prepare SOP, WI, QC parameters (7d)
PARALLEL - Service
A: Head of Service

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T42 Review installation quality (30d)
A: Head of Service

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T33 GATE
Train Service Leader BAST (3d)
+ certify installers
A: Head of Service

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T35 Confirm SDPPI received (2d)
HARD BLOCKER
A: Procurement

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T36 GATE 7
Pricing + Packaging (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T43 Track KPIs vs original L1 (90d)
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T44 GATE 8
3-month post-release review (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Launch blocked
no legal right to sell
